cells.name: The change (green up, red down) in fantasy points from the previous game day
The change (green up, red down) in fantasy points from the previous game day
CS -- Given to the hitter to gets caught stealing
PKO -- Awarded as a negative statistics to the player who got picked off (Hitting stat)
TB -- Singles + (2 x Doubles) + (3 x Triples) + (4 x Home Runs)
HBP -- This is awarded only to the player who is batting, not pitching
Sl -- A home run with the bases loaded
CYC -- A hitter gets a single, double, triple and home run in the same game
GWRBI -- Credited to the batter whose at-bat was responsible for bringing his team ahead for the final time in the game.
PHG -- 1 point when a hitter has at least 3 Plate Appearances and an OBP of 1.000
The change (green up, red down) in fantasy points from the previous game day

SV -- When the pitcher enters a game where his team is leading, finishes the game without surrendering the lead, is not the winning pitcher, and either (a) the lead was 3 runs or less when the pitcher entered the game; (b) the potential tying run was on base, at bat, or on deck; or (c) the pitcher pitched three or more innings.
BS -- When a pitcher enters the game in a save situation and is charged the run (earned or not) which eliminates his team's lead.
HLD -- When a pitcher enters a game in a save situation, records at least one out, does not surrender the lead, and does not complete the game.
BK -- When a pitcher commits an illegal pitching action or other illegal action while in contact with the pitching rubber, thus allowing baserunners to advance.
SHO -- A complete game pitched with no runs allowed.

PG -- When a pitcher retires each batter on the opposing team during the entire course of a game, which consists of at least nine innings. In a perfect game, no batter reaches any base during the course of the game.
QA11 -- 1 point if IP >= 5 and ER <= 3
QRA -- 1 Point if Relief Appearances = 1 and Innings Pitched >= 1 and WHIP <= 0.75
PKO -- Awarded to the player who is responsible for picking off the player (Fielding stat)
Caught Stealing -- Given to the hitter to gets caught stealing
Picked Off -- Awarded as a negative statistics to the player who got picked off (Hitting stat)
Total Bases -- Singles + (2 x Doubles) + (3 x Triples) + (4 x Home Runs)
Hit By Pitches -- This is awarded only to the player who is batting, not pitching
Grand Slams -- A home run with the bases loaded
Hit For The Cycle -- A hitter gets a single, double, triple and home run in the same game
Game Winning RBI -- Credited to the batter whose at-bat was responsible for bringing his team ahead for the final time in the game.
Perfect Hitting Games -- 1 point when a hitter has at least 3 Plate Appearances and an OBP of 1.000

Saves -- When the pitcher enters a game where his team is leading, finishes the game without surrendering the lead, is not the winning pitcher, and either (a) the lead was 3 runs or less when the pitcher entered the game; (b) the potential tying run was on base, at bat, or on deck; or (c) the pitcher pitched three or more innings.
Blown Saves -- When a pitcher enters the game in a save situation and is charged the run (earned or not) which eliminates his team's lead.
Holds -- When a pitcher enters a game in a save situation, records at least one out, does not surrender the lead, and does not complete the game.
Balks -- When a pitcher commits an illegal pitching action or other illegal action while in contact with the pitching rubber, thus allowing baserunners to advance.
Shutouts -- A complete game pitched with no runs allowed.

Perfect Games -- When a pitcher retires each batter on the opposing team during the entire course of a game, which consists of at least nine innings. In a perfect game, no batter reaches any base during the course of the game.
Quality Appearances 11 -- 1 point if IP >= 5 and ER <= 3
Quality Relief Appearances -- 1 Point if Relief Appearances = 1 and Innings Pitched >= 1 and WHIP <= 0.75
Pickoffs -- Awarded to the player who is responsible for picking off the player (Fielding stat)

transactions.desc: The Rockies recalled Halvorsen from Triple-A Albuquerque on Saturday.
The Dodgers claimed Barnes off waivers from the Cubs on Saturday.
The Red Sox optioned Anderson to Triple-A Worcester on Saturday, Ari Alexander of 7 News Boston reports.
The Red Sox reinstated Slaten (oblique) from the injured list Saturday, Ari Alexander of 7 News Boston reports.
The Astros claimed Thomas off waivers from the Mariners on Saturday and optioned him to Triple-A Sugar Land.
The Rays designated Malloy for assignment Saturday.
The Rays optioned Englert to Triple-A Durham on Saturday.
The Rays selected Brooks' contract from Triple-A Durham on Saturday.
The Brewers recalled Perkins from Triple-A Nashville on Saturday, Curt Hogg of the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel reports.
The Astros recalled Murray from Triple-A Sugar Land on Saturday, Julia Morales of Space City Home Network reports.
The Giants selected Porter's contract from Triple-A Sacramento on Saturday, Ari Alexander of 7 News Boston reports.
The Twins recalled Adams from Triple-A St. Paul on Saturday, Dan Hayes of The Athletic reports.
The San Francisco Giants traded C Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians.
The Cleveland Guardians traded LHP Matt Wilkinson to the San Francisco Giants.
The Blue Jays optioned Pinango to Triple-A Buffalo on Saturday.
The Blue Jays reinstated Barger (ankle) from the injured list Saturday.
The Guardians optioned Naylor to Triple-A Columbus on Saturday, Zack Meisel of The Athletic reports.
The Dodgers recalled Gervase from Triple-A Oklahoma City on Friday.
The Pirates recalled Yorke from Triple-A Indianapolis on Friday.
The Philadelphia Phillies traded RHP Enyel Garcia to the Baltimore Orioles.
The Philadelphia Phillies traded RHP Maicol Lauriano to the Baltimore Orioles.
The Cubs optioned Hollowell to Triple-A Iowa on Friday.
The Cubs reinstated Roberts (finger) from the 15-day injured list Friday.
The Tigers optioned Jung to Triple-A Toledo on Friday, Jason Beck of MLB.com reports.
Short signed a major-league contract with the Tigers on Friday, Jason Beck of MLB.com reports.
The Orioles recalled Gibson from Triple-A Norfolk on Friday.
The Royals optioned Cerantola to Triple-A Omaha on Friday.
The Angels selected Martinez's contract from Triple-A Salt Lake on Friday.
The Royals recalled Kolek from Triple-A Omaha on Friday.
The Royals recalled Cruz from Triple-A Omaha on Friday.
